channel.title: DiAlgo — News & blog
channel.description: Tips and updates on family communication, caring for dependent relatives, and gerontechnology.

item.title: Apps for caregivers of older adults: How to choose the best option
item.description: We analyze the best apps for caregiver support, telecare, and family coordination tools to organize care for older adults.

item.title: How to communicate with a person with dementia: Practical family guide
item.description: Practical tips and communication guidelines recommended by leading geriatric and Alzheimer's societies.

item.title: Telecare vs Family communication apps: Which does your relative need?
item.description: We compare traditional telecare alarm services with family communication and coordination apps for older adults care.

item.title: How to organize the care of a dependent relative without burning out
item.description: Practical guidelines to structure your family support network, share caregiving duties, and avoid caregiver burnout.
